name: workflow transition acquires the sectioned advisory lock before mutating the state file
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/locks && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/transition.sh" --to plan --lock-dir .claude-tdd-pro/locks --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q 'lock_acquired=workflow_state' err.txt && grep -q 'lock_released=workflow_state' err.txt && echo ok 1>&2
